---
name: refocusNextPhasePlan
description: Refocus a phase plan toward admin/teacher migration priorities.
argument-hint: Current plan text or key scope changes to apply
---
You are updating the next-phase plan document. Prioritize teacher/admin dashboards and legacy admin modules over student polish. Update these sections:
- Current state recap: mention partial migration for dashboards, reports, settings, and legacy-first admin lists/queues.
- Next steps: put teacher/admin dashboard parity first, then admin lists, admin document queues, reports/settings parity, followed by remaining student items.
- Prerequisites/flags: add required admin endpoints (queues, stats, list pagination/filter/export).
- Risks/unknowns: add admin workflow complexity and recommend migrating one queue end-to-end before cloning.
- Verification: include teacher/admin dashboard KPIs and at least one admin queue end-to-end.
Keep changes concise and consistent with the existing plan tone.
